name: ctxparty
description: A terminal workspace for coordinating multiple coding agents in one shared project session.

scripts.smoke: node src/cli.js --cwd .ctxparty-smoke --participants mock --once "sketch the project shape"
scripts.e2e:browser: npm test --prefix e2e/browser-terminal -- scenarios/ctrl-c-empty-exit.json && npm test --prefix e2e/browser-terminal -- scenarios/ctrl-c-exit.json
scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/pi-tui.js && node --check src/runtime/router.js && node --check src/runtime/workspace.js && node --check src/runtime/transcript.js && node --check src/agents/mock-agent.js && node --check src/agents/cli-agents.js && node --check src/tui/autocomplete.js && node -e "import('./src/pi-tui.js').then(() => console.log('pi-tui import ok'))" && node --input-type=module -e "const { CtxpartyAutocompleteProvider } = await import('./src/tui/autocomplete.js'); const p = new CtxpartyAutocompleteProvider(); const s1 = await p.getSuggestions(['/'],0,1,{signal:new AbortController().signal}); const s2 = await p.getSuggestions(['@c'],0,2,{signal:new AbortController().signal}); if (!s1?.items.some(i=>i.value==='help') || !s2?.items.some(i=>i.value==='codex')) process.exit(1); console.log('autocomplete ok')"
